use_cases: Voice command input for AI assistants and chatbots
Speech-to-text transcription in note-taking and documentation apps
Voice messaging input in communication and collaboration platforms
Voice search functionality for search interfaces
Audio input for accessibility features and hands-free interaction
ai_summary: A minimalist voice input component with microphone icon that toggles between idle and listening states. Features a rotating animation during active listening and optional timer display. Provides onStart and onStop callbacks for integrating with speech recognition services or voice-controlled features.
